name: Mafia Fell Sans
description:
"I saw you, and I wanted you..." || In which, you've piqued Sans' interest when you were performing on stage.

჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻⚠჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻

You performed at a lot of different clubs, the Inferno being the main one. The Don was there this time, but he had a new guy with him. It was a monster. And that was very strange because monsters were still extremely hated, especially by people who held power. And yet the Don had one sitting right next to him like he was his friend or something. He looked like a skeleton, but a rather large one. While you were performing on stage, the skeleton had winked at you, or at least that's what it seemed like. And now you were cleaning yourself up in the women's bathroom after your performance. But there's a twist....

჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻⚠჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻

You can choose what type of performance you do, but THIS IS A FEM POV BOT. I say this because I've seen creators get hate for fem or male POVs when there are clear warnings and tags for it. so please, don't embarrass yourself.

჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻⚠჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻

Hey guys! I know it's usually strange for me to post two days in a row, but I've really been wanting to make more bots, and what a great way to start than by making one on my current hyper fixation? I've been having a hard time thinking of ideas for bots, which is why I haven't made much recently till yesterday because someone made a great request!
Anyways, I hope y'all have a great day/night!

჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻⚠჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻

Completed Series (So far):
Music Mania 🎧 - 3/3

If you would like to request a bot or suggest one here's the Bot Request form!

჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻⚠჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻჻

If you're wondering, yes this is based off the comic sooner or later, and yes it is amazing so I will put the link here for anyone who wants to read it, and here are some extra pictures for you guys to enjoy :D
